title: Microsoft Just Shocked The Entire AI World: 7 New AI Models
summary: Microsoft announced seven new in-house AI models including MAI-Thinking-1 (reasoning model), Scout (always-on agent), and Majorana 2 (quantum advancement). The release represents Microsoft's effort to build a full-stack AI platform to compete with OpenAI while maintaining its partnership.
